Step 1: Upload Documents

Upload ID documents first. OCR will auto-extract the merchant and owner details.

📄
Click to upload

Step 2: OCR Extracted Data

Fields extracted by OCR are highlighted in green. Missing fields in yellow need manual entry.

Owner / Person Details (from ID)

Step 3: Complete KYC Details

Fill in the remaining business and compliance information.

Business Information

Owner Compliance

Step 4: Review, Save & Link to Fingerprint

Review all details, then save. After saving, this merchant will be linked to your device intelligence dashboard.

✅

Sanctions Screening

Manual Name Check

Check any name against OFAC, UN, EU, and OpenSanctions lists.

Batch Re-screening

Re-screens all merchants and owners against updated sanctions lists.
